TRANSLATION OF DOCUMENT 2057-PS
1934 REICHSGESETZBLATT PART I, PAGE 529
Law Relating to National Emergency Defense Measures of 3 July 1934
The Reich Government has enacted the following law, which is hereby promulgated:
ONLY ARTICLE
The measures taken on 30 June and 1 and 2 July 1934 to counteract attempt at treason and high treason shall be considered as national emergency defense.
Berlin, 3 July 1934.
The Reich Chancellor
Adolf Hitler
The Reich Minister of the Interior
Frick
The Reich Minister of Justice
Dr. Guertner
Source:
Nazi Conspiracy and Aggression Volume IV
Office of the United States Chief Counsel for Prosecution of Axis Criminality
Washington, DC : United States Government Printing Office, 1946
